MAKO ROBOTIC-ASSISTED TOTAL KNEE ARTHROPLASTY
SURGICAL PLANNING REPORT

SYSTEM: Stryker Mako SmartRobotics
IMPLANT: Triathlon Total Knee System

PRE-OPERATIVE PLANNING DATA:
- Mechanical Axis: 8.2 degrees varus
- Tibial Slope: 3.0 degrees posterior
- Femoral Component Size: Size 5
- Tibial Component Size: Size 4
- Insert Thickness: 10mm

INTRAOPERATIVE DATA:
- Registration Accuracy: 0.8mm RMS
- Bone Cuts Executed:
  - Distal Femur: 0.3mm deviation from plan
  - Posterior Femur: 0.5mm deviation from plan
  - Tibial Plateau: 0.2mm deviation from plan
- Final Alignment:
  - Mechanical Axis: 0.5 degrees valgus (target: 0 degrees)
  - Tibial Component: 2.8 degrees posterior slope
  - Femoral Rotation: 3.0 degrees external rotation

SOFT TISSUE BALANCE:
- Extension Gap: 20mm medial, 20mm lateral (balanced)
- Flexion Gap: 22mm medial, 21mm lateral (balanced)

IMPLANT DETAILS:
- Femoral Component: Triathlon CR Size 5, Porous Coated
- Tibial Baseplate: Triathlon Size 4, Porous Coated
- Poly Insert: Triathlon CR 10mm
- Patella: 32mm All-Poly

OPERATIVE NOTE SUMMARY:
Robotic-assisted total knee arthroplasty completed successfully.
All bone cuts within 1mm of surgical plan. Final alignment and
soft tissue balance achieved as planned. No complications.
